Petition To Instruct Trustee On Bypass Trust To Add A Beneficiary
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Continued To May-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Gibbons (via court call) for (petitioner) Hilda Bipes.

The Court stated that the petition is seeking to add a beneficiary on the basis of consent, that the code requires the inclusion of contingent beneficiaries and asked if there were any. Ms. Gibbons stated that she did not know, that the children were between ages 40-50, that if there are grandchildren they could be adults. The Court stated that the matter will need to be continued to obtain the consent of the contingent beneficiaries and that if any of them are minor's they may need a Guardian ad Litem. Ms. Gibbons stated that this would be expensive, that they could overlook the contingent beneficiaries as the trust names the surviving spouse as beneficiary until her death and that there is no reason to believe that the contingent beneficiaries would not consent. The petition to instruct trustee on bypass trust to add a beneficiary was continued to May 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
